title: Rifts
description:
Tear warp rifts for easy travel! 
Warps all entities, including items and mobs.
body:
Rifts introduces physical rifts in your world which teleports all entities to the linked location. The rift is made with obsidian and an end crystal, and must be linked to a lodestone through a compass.

You can have as many linked rifts as you want, and they keep on teleporting after the lodestone is removed.

Teleports all entities, including items and mobs.

No tick functions

<details>
<summary>How to open a rift.</summary>

1. Place an obsidian with a crying obsidian 3 blocks above, with a 2 block gap between.
2. Place the end crystal on the obsidian, and right click it with a lodestone compass; consuming the compass.
3. Right click the end crystal with an ender eye to create a rift; consuming the eye.
4. Entering the rift will noe warp you or any other entity on top of the connected lodestone.

Only works in the same dimension.


</details>

![How to open a rift](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edb6cf77176c43d207aeeb83a48d908022a26d9f.png)
